value.value: Can only edit draft or in-progress sessions

constraints.name: warnIncomplete
constraints.messageTemplate: Completing session '{sessionName}' with only {counted}/{total} items counted

constraints.name: warnCancelInProgress
constraints.messageTemplate: Cancelling in-progress session '{sessionName}' with {counted} items already counted

constraints.name: warnLargeVariance
constraints.messageTemplate: Verifying record for '{itemName}' with large variance ({variancePct}%)

value.value: Can only reject pending or reviewed reports
Cannot update discrepancy with status outside pending/reviewed

policies.name: LeadsCanVerify
policies.message: Leads and managers can verify counts

policies.name: ManagersCanCreateSession
policies.message: Leads and managers can create count sessions

policies.name: ManagersCanApproveVariance
policies.message: Only managers can approve variance reports
